headerTitle: Staff AI Engineer  ·  AI Platform Foundation  ·  Multi-Model Production Systems  ·  Mental Health Tech
intro: Rula is building the AI foundation layer for behavioral health delivery — LLM routing, evaluation harnesses, and production reliability across clinician-facing systems. Fourteen live AI endpoints with multi-model routing, human-in-the-loop, and MCP protocol are the daily working pattern.
bullets: Production AI platform at scale — 14 live Claude + GPT-4o + Gemini endpoints with multi-model routing by task complexity, structured JSON contracts validated with Zod, fallback behaviors, and HITL confirm-before-execute. Opinions on agent contract design are production-formed.

Evaluation and reliability discipline — cross-model consistency checks, input-output pair logging, prompt drift detection on model updates, and regression test sets that catch output failures before end users see them. Built because production AI fails unexpectedly.

Full-stack delivery at Staff IC level — 13 platforms shipped solo: Next.js 15, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, BullMQ + Redis, Docker, PM2, Nginx. AI layer sits on top of a reliable full-stack foundation, not a prototype.
matchNotes: Strong match on AI platform foundation work, multi-model routing, production eval harnesses. Mental health domain is new. Staff IC level — solo-shipped 13 platforms qualifies. Remote. $207-243K is strong band. Posted May 31.
